 On Tue, Nov 20, 2001 at 04:57:21PM -0500, Rob Simmons wrote:
 
 > I think that "they" may have infected one of the packages that mindguard
 > depends on to prevent it from functioning.
 >=20
 > Or they may have access to the computer that I'm using right now.
 > gotta go, I've said too much already.
 
 Hmm, it works fine for me..I just checked.  Try rebuilding it with
 debugging symbols and get a proper traceback (this one doesn't
 actually show where it crashed).
 
 Kris
 
 P.S.  In the meantime I recommend you wear an extra layer of aluminium
 foil in your Deflector Beanie, just to be safe.
 
 --FL5UXtIhxfXey3p5
